chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-519 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 159/2025 30.01.2025 Mr. Waheed Karan Shoro Advocate for Respondent No.2. -.-.-. Learned Counsel for Respondent No.2 states that even after obtaining the ad interim relief on 26.12.2024, the Petitioner has not deposited the amount of Rs.18,90,840/- in Court, which fact is also evident from the office Note in the court file. He further pleads that the Respondent No.2 is now suffering from blindness and has also to incur huge expenses for marriage of his daughter, however despite Orders passed by the Commissioner for Workers’ Compensation & Authority under the Sindh Payment of Wages Act, Hyderabad and the second Order passed by the learned Labour Court No.6, the Petitioner is only lingering the matter. He further raises objection on the maintainability of this Petition on the ground that alternate efficacious remedy as mandatorily required to be availed prior to approaching this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, has not been availed, which according to him could have been availed by way of filing a Revision before the Labour Tribunal Karachi, which remedy was not availed and is now also become barred by limitation. In view of the above, urgency is allowed and the Order dated 26.12.2024 is modified to the extent that within 15 days from today, the Petitioner shall deposit the amount as directed in the said Order to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court failing which the Orders shall stand vacated automatically. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner is also directed to appear and proceed with the case on next date of hearing without fail.

In view of the above, urgency is allowed and the Order dated 26.12.2024 is modified to the extent that within 15 days from today, the Petitioner shall deposit the amount as directed in the said Order to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court failing which the Orders shall stand vacated automatically. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner is also directed to appear and proceed with the case on next date of hearing without fail. Adjourned to 27.02.2025. J U D G E Ali Haider
